quotes.text: Trailers are supposed to be pretty dumb. This is what makes them valuable from a logistical perspective. If we hyper focus on reducing the carbon footprint of each specific shipment we may find we created an overall increase in aggregate once the higher order and deferred consequences come to bear.
quotes.author: bob1029
quotes.source: Hacker News — Self-Powered Trailers Promise Leaner Freight Runs
quotes.extraction_note: Pithy insight on simplicity vs. over-optimization in systems design, directly applicable to software engineering.

quotes.text: GPT didn't make any progress reverse engineering ancient Corel Draw documents until I told it to ignore the open source libraries. LibreOffice's import code was half-baked, and silently changing Arial to Liberation Sans wasn't particularly liberating.
quotes.author: badlibrarian
quotes.source: Hacker News — How proprietary formats have become Microsoft's main tool for lock-in
quotes.extraction_note: Telling GPT to ignore OSS libraries to actually get work done is peak grug. The Liberation Sans quip is genuinely funny dev humor. Anti-bloat wisdom disguised as a war story.
